scripts.docker:dev: sleep 5 && docker exec smarthead_node npm run dev
scripts.docker:migrate: docker exec smarthead_php php artisan migrate
scripts.docker:seed: docker exec smarthead_php php artisan db:seed
scripts.build_front: docker exec smarthead_node npm run build
scripts.docker:init: docker exec smarthead_php composer install && docker exec smarthead_php php artisan key:generate && npm run docker:migrate && docker exec smarthead_node npm install && docker exec smarthead_node npm run build
